query:
ALTER TABLE game_map_nodes 
  ADD COLUMN region varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '初界' AFTER wuxing,
  ADD COLUMN sub_region varchar(100) NULL AFTER region,
  ADD COLUMN description text NULL AFTER sub_region,
  ADD COLUMN level_min int DEFAULT 1 AFTER description,
  ADD COLUMN level_max int DEFAULT 99 AFTER level_min,
  ADD COLUMN real_world_name varchar(200) NULL AFTER level_max,
  ADD COLUMN sort_order int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER real_world_name
